top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Schneider Electric Sponsor Spotlight
top_signals.summary: Elizabeth Hackenson, Chief Information Officer at Schneider Electric speaks with Bloomberg’s Sofia Economopoulos about sustainability and digital infrastructure at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says Thursday's rally shows investors' 'huge appetite' for stocks
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Thursday's rally showed investors remain resilient and eager to buy stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Euro-Zone Economy Shrank as Ireland Numbers Distort Picture
top_signals.summary: The euro-zone economy shrank at the start of the year after an unprecedented contraction in Ireland forced a revision to data that originally showed feeble growth.

top_signals.title: Corient Sponsor Spotlight
top_signals.summary: Adam Katz, Head of Entrepreneurs & Founders at Corient speaks with Bloomberg’s Mark Miller about founder strategy and wealth management trends at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Okta Sponsor Spotlight
top_signals.summary: Shannon Duffy, Chief Marketing Officer at Okta speaks with Bloomberg’s Sofia Economopoulos about securing the agentic enterprise at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: The UK chemicals sector is in trouble
top_signals.summary: From ammonia to plastics, there can be no modern economy without a functioning chemicals industry, and Britain's is in peril.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
